action.reasoning: Observation: The 3-model uniform ensemble reached mean_r2=0.5302 (new best). We have ~85 minutes and 14 iterations left. Training a 4th model from scratch takes ~30 min and may only marginally help. Analysis: A cheaper, high-ROI improvement is to replace uniform averaging with learned stacking weights. By fitting a Ridge regression per output column on the validation set using the 3 existing models' predictions, we can optimally combine them and potentially boost mean_r2 without any new training. Decision: Write compute_ensemble_weights.py to fit per-column Ridge weights on val data, update predict.py to apply them, run the script, and submit eval immediately.
